title: Check 1F: No || 0 anti-pattern in streams.ts
evidence: Grepped for '|| 0' pattern in shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts — zero matches. All numeric defaults use ?? (nullish coalescing).
actual: Clean — no violations

title: Check 1J: parseInt without NaN guard at streams.ts:1183
evidence: streams.ts:1183 — parseInt(count, 10) in xpending(). Has radix parameter but no isNaN guard. Input comes from Redis XPENDING protocol response which always returns valid integer strings for pending counts.
expected: NaN guard on all parseInt calls
actual: parseInt(count, 10) without NaN guard — Redis protocol guarantees valid int, so risk is negligible
recommendation: Optional: add ?? 0 fallback for defense-in-depth. Not blocking — Redis XPENDING always returns integer strings.

title: Checks 1G-1K: Only streams.ts is .ts — 1G(HMAC), 1H(feature flags), 1I(risk config), 1K(error handling) not applicable
evidence: 6 changed files: .env.example, docker-compose.partition.yml, coordinator-standby.toml, coordinator.toml, coordinator/Dockerfile, streams.ts. Only streams.ts is a .ts source file. Checks 1G-1K are code-pattern checks not relevant to streams.ts scope.
actual: Incremental skip for checks 1G, 1H, 1I, 1K

title: Check 1L: All 11 service ports unique and match code defaults
evidence: service-ports.json: coordinator=3000, P1=3001, P2=3002, P3=3003, P4=3004, EE=3005, CC=3006, UD=3007, MD=3008, coordinator-worker=3009, monolith=3100. All unique. Fly.io TOMLs verified: coordinator(3000), P1(3001), P2(3002), P3(3003), P4(3004), EE(3005), CC(3006) — all match registry.
expected: No port collisions, all defaults match registry
actual: All 11 ports unique, all Fly.io TOML ports match service-ports.json

title: Check 1M: No empty catch blocks in streams.ts
evidence: Grepped for empty catch blocks (both 'catch(e){}' and 'catch{}' patterns) in streams.ts — zero matches. All catch blocks contain error handling logic.
actual: Clean — no empty catch blocks

title: Check 1N: 5 'as any' casts in streams.ts for ioredis method signatures
evidence: streams.ts:826 (xread), 923 (xreadgroup), 1245 (xclaim), 1308 (xpending), 1352 (xtrim) — all cast this.client methods to 'as any' because ioredis TypeScript definitions don't cover XREAD/XREADGROUP variadic argument patterns.
actual: 5 'as any' casts — all at ioredis API boundary where TS definitions are incomplete. Known limitation of @types/ioredis.
recommendation: Acceptable — ioredis type definitions don't support variadic stream command args. Would require custom type augmentation.

title: Check 1O: Redis key prefixes — no cross-service collisions detected
evidence: Source key prefixes found: health:system:snapshot (enhanced-health-monitor.ts:544), metrics:system:recent (enhanced-health-monitor.ts:872), quality:score:current (professional-quality-monitor.ts:352), auth:attempts:* (security), lock:* (detector-lifecycle), risk:probabilities:*, dlq:*, bridge:recovery:*, stream:exec-requests-{fast,l2,premium,solana}, stream:execution-requests, stream:opportunities, stream:price-updates. Former SA-1O-002 collision (health:snapshot) fully migrated to health:system:snapshot.
actual: No collisions found. All prefixes use service-scoped namespacing.

title: Check 1P ADR-022: No spread-in-loop violations in hot-path files
evidence: price-matrix.ts: 2 spread usages (lines 507, 1065) both in getConfig()/getStats() return statements (not in loops). execution-engine/src/: 30 spread usages all in config merging, object returns, or Set-to-array conversions — none inside for/while/forEach loops.
expected: No spread operators in tight loops per ADR-022
actual: No violations found

title: Check 1P ADR-002: No inter-service HTTP calls in non-test source
evidence: Grepped for fetch('http://localhost'), axios.get/post in services/**/*.ts. Only matches: (1) coordinator integration tests (test files, expected), (2) coordinator middleware CORS whitelist (origin allow-list, not inter-service call). No axios usage found. Services communicate exclusively via Redis Streams.
actual: No inter-service HTTP found in source

title: Check 1P ADR-018: Circuit breaker default threshold=5 confirmed
evidence: simple-circuit-breaker.ts:76 constructor(threshold = 5), line 191 { threshold = 5 }. All CB instances use default 5 unless explicitly configured higher.
actual: Default is 5 in all constructors and factory functions

title: Check 1P ADR-005: SharedArrayBuffer confirmed in price-matrix.ts
evidence: shared/core/src/caching/price-matrix.ts: SharedArrayBuffer found in 10 source files under shared/core/src/. Primary usage in price-matrix.ts with worker thread access via getSharedBuffer()/getKeyRegistryBuffer(). ArrayBuffer fallback for non-worker contexts.
expected: SharedArrayBuffer for L1 price cache per ADR-005
actual: Fully implemented with fallback

title: VERIFIED: SA-1E-001 fix — .env.example now has EXECUTION_ENGINE_HOST documented
evidence: .env.example:69 — '# EXECUTION_ENGINE_HOST=localhost'. Documented as commented entry (per convention for optional vars).
actual: Present at line 69 as commented entry

title: VERIFIED: SA-1Q-008 fix — coordinator-standby.toml has COORDINATOR_CHAIN_GROUP_ROUTING=true
evidence: coordinator-standby.toml:35 — COORDINATOR_CHAIN_GROUP_ROUTING = "true" with comment 'SM-002/ADR-038: Must mirror primary coordinator for seamless failover.'
actual: Present at line 35 with failover rationale comment
recommendation: SA-1Q-008 fix confirmed — standby now mirrors primary for chain-group routing

title: VERIFIED: SA-1Q-006 fix — docker-compose.partition.yml comment says 512mb
evidence: docker-compose.partition.yml:87 — '#   docker-compose.partition.yml (prod):   512mb'. Line 98 command: --maxmemory 512mb --maxmemory-policy noeviction. Comment and actual value are now consistent.
expected: Comment says 512mb matching actual maxmemory value
actual: Comment at line 87 says 512mb, command at line 98 uses 512mb
recommendation: SA-1Q-006 fix confirmed — comment matches actual Redis maxmemory

title: VERIFIED: SA-1E-002 fix — streams.ts has TODO(breaking-change) comments near LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT shims
evidence: streams.ts:1683-1684 — '// TODO(breaking-change): Remove LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT shim once all deployments // use STREAM_LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT (target: next major version). Tracked as SA-1E-002.' Also at line 1750: '// TODO(breaking-change): Remove LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT shim (SA-1E-002).' Both locations mark deprecated env var with migration path.
actual: Present at lines 1683-1684 and 1750, both referencing SA-1E-002
recommendation: SA-1E-002 fix confirmed — tech debt properly tracked with breaking-change TODOs

title: VERIFIED: RT-3P-001 fix — coordinator TOML and Dockerfile use --max-old-space-size=192
evidence: coordinator.toml:77 — app = "node --max-old-space-size=192 dist/index.js" (with RT-3P-001 comment at line 76). coordinator-standby.toml:72 — app = "node --max-old-space-size=192 dist/index.js" (with RT-3P-001 comment at line 71). Dockerfile:24 — CMD ["node", "--max-old-space-size=192", "dist/index.js"] (with RT-3P-001 comment at line 23).
actual: All three files have --max-old-space-size=192
recommendation: RT-3P-001 fix confirmed — all 3 coordinator configs aligned on 192MB heap

title: All Fly.io TOML ports match service-ports.json with correct health check paths
evidence: 8 TOML files verified: coordinator(3000,/api/health), coordinator-standby(3000,/api/health), P1(3001,/health), P2(3002,/health), P3(3003,/health), P4(3004,/health), EE(3005,/health), CC(3006,/health). All use interval=15s per ADR-007. Coordinator uses /api/health (Express prefix), all others use /health.
expected: Ports match service-ports.json, health paths correct
actual: All aligned

title: All Dockerfiles use node:22-alpine — aligned with engines requirement
evidence: 14 FROM statements across 8 Dockerfiles all use node:22-alpine: unified-detector(2), partition-asia-fast(2), cross-chain-detector(2), execution-engine(1), partition-l2-turbo(2), partition-solana(2), coordinator(1), partition-high-value(2).
actual: All 14 FROM clauses use node:22-alpine

title: Docker Compose files consistent — all use Redis noeviction+512mb, 15s health intervals
evidence: 3 compose files: docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.partition.yml, docker-compose.testnet.yml. All use 'redis-server --maxmemory 512mb --maxmemory-policy noeviction'. All health check intervals standardized to 15s.
actual: All aligned

title: Check 1R: INCREMENTAL SKIP — no timeout files changed
evidence: Changed files: .env.example, docker-compose.partition.yml, coordinator-standby.toml, coordinator.toml, coordinator/Dockerfile, streams.ts. No timeout hierarchy files in changeset.
